title: Codereview pass 1: relay_seen eviction - hardcoded limit 128
description: The relay_seen cache limit of 128 is hardcoded in two places (lines 392 and 482). Consider extracting to a named constant like RELAY_SEEN_MAX_SIZE for maintainability. Minor finding - P3.
close_reason: Extracted RELAY_SEEN_MAX_SIZE = 128 constant, replaced hardcoded values
